title: Epic_Fight_X_Rpg_Tag
description: The project is an epic fight animation of the RPGApocalypticEvolution weapons and mobs
body:
I animated some of the weapons in the RPGApocalypticEvolution mod for the Epic fight mod

- Note!!! Required Items:

1. Epic Fight:[https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight)
2. RPGApocalypticEvolution:[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rpg-rpgae](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rpg-rpgae)
3. Weapons of miracles:[https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles](https://modrinth.com/mod/weapons-of-miracles)![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fefc41b763cc2696bbb080ecf9df2cbb63b1cdbc.jpeg)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9717e94511e709acc96635c8e082dedb2d1fa837.jpeg)![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a9b7596299b2eefb94250f0e2c3d1c57f221ab.jpeg)![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5d496151e37be9222f1b96a7f269adf1d89e724.jpeg)
